title: Implement trait hook system (TraitHookType, RemoveReason, TraitCallback, registerTraitHook API)

reference_files.reason: Trait runtime hooks - 5 hook types (onTick/onHit/onBlockHit/onExpire/onRemove), RemoveReason enum (6 values), TraitHookType enum, registerTraitHook API, callback signatures
onExpire vs onRemove trigger relationship, RemoveReason enum values (HIT_ENTITY/HIT_BLOCK/EXPIRED/UNLOADED_CHUNK/MANUAL/DIMENSION_UNLOAD)

acceptance_criteria: TraitHookType enum created with values: ON_TICK, ON_HIT, ON_BLOCK_HIT, ON_EXPIRE, ON_REMOVE (ON_VISUAL_TICK excluded - belongs to M4 rendering)
RemoveReason enum created with values: HIT_ENTITY, HIT_BLOCK, EXPIRED, UNLOADED_CHUNK, MANUAL, DIMENSION_UNLOAD

Functional callback interfaces created for each hook type: TraitTickCallback (BulletRecord, BulletSnapshot), TraitHitCallback (BulletRecord, BulletSnapshot, Entity), TraitBlockHitCallback (BulletRecord, BulletSnapshot, BlockPos, Direction), TraitExpireCallback (BulletRecord, BulletSnapshot), TraitRemoveCallback (BulletRecord, BulletSnapshot, RemoveReason)
ModularShootAPI.registerTraitHook(ResourceLocation traitId, TraitHookType type, callback) method added (registers callback in internal registry keyed by traitId + hookType)
Internal TraitHookRegistry maintains Map<ResourceLocation, Map<TraitHookType, List<callback>>> for lookup during bullet tick
One trait ID can register multiple callbacks for same hook type, stored in registration order
BulletRecord and BulletSnapshot references may be forward declarations/stubs if 07 not yet complete
